name: snipeval
purpose: Run a snippet in the project's own interpreter (venv python / project node) with a timeout; capture stdout, stderr, return code, and a python trailing-expression repr as JSON.
why: Runs the snippet in the project's real dependency versions and returns actual stdout/return-code - not a predicted output.
reach_for_me_when: you are about to predict what a line of code returns instead of running it
you need to run code in the project's installed dependency versions, not from memory
you want a snippet's real stdout/stderr/return-code as a structured result
avoid_when: the snippet is trivial and its output is obvious by reading it

commands.name: run
commands.summary: Execute a snippet and return captured output as JSON
